title: Insufficient Funds
description: The account does not have enough available balance to complete this transaction.
customerMessage: Your account balance is too low for this payment. Please add funds or try a smaller amount.
resolution: Check available balance (not total balance - some may be reserved). Top up account or reduce payment amount.

title: Account Not Found
description: The destination account number does not exist in our system or the partner bank's system.
customerMessage: The recipient account was not found. Please check the account number and IFSC code.
resolution: Verify IFSC code and account number. Try the full 16-digit account number without spaces.

title: Account Blocked
description: The source or destination account has been blocked by the bank due to suspicious activity or regulatory compliance.
customerMessage: Your account has been temporarily blocked. Please contact your bank for assistance.
resolution: Contact bank support to understand the reason for blocking. May require document submission.

title: Daily Transaction Limit Exceeded
description: The transaction amount exceeds the daily or per-transaction limit set for this account type.
customerMessage: You've reached your daily payment limit. The limit will reset at midnight, or you can request a higher limit.
resolution: Split payment across multiple days, or request temporary limit increase via bank app/branch.

title: Bank System Timeout
description: The partner bank's payment system did not respond within the expected time window. The transaction status is uncertain.
customerMessage: The payment is taking longer than expected. Please check back in a few minutes before retrying.
resolution: Wait 5-10 minutes and check transaction status. Do not retry immediately as the original transaction may still process.

title: Invalid IFSC Code
description: The IFSC code provided does not exist or has been decommissioned after bank branch restructuring.
customerMessage: The bank branch code (IFSC) is invalid or has changed. Please get the updated IFSC from the recipient.
resolution: Check RBI website or bank website for current IFSC. Many branches were merged and IFSC codes changed.

title: UPI ID Deactivated
description: The recipient's UPI ID has been deactivated or the linked bank account was changed.
customerMessage: The UPI ID is not active. Please ask the recipient for their current UPI ID or bank details.
resolution: Contact recipient to confirm their active UPI ID or use direct bank account transfer instead.

title: Transaction Declined by Risk System
description: The transaction was declined by the fraud and risk management system based on transaction patterns.
customerMessage: This transaction was declined for security reasons. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
resolution: Customer can contact support for review. Common causes: new device, unusual amount, new payee.

title: KYC Verification Required
description: Full transaction features are restricted until KYC verification is completed.
customerMessage: Please complete your KYC verification to enable payments above ₹10,000.
resolution: Complete KYC in the app using Aadhaar or PAN card. Process typically takes 5-10 minutes.

title: Duplicate Transaction Detected
description: An identical transaction was already processed recently. This is a safety guard against double payments.
customerMessage: This payment was already processed. Please check your transaction history.
resolution: Check transaction history in the app. If the previous transaction failed, wait 30 minutes before retrying.

title: Recipient Bank Unavailable
description: The recipient's bank system is currently unavailable due to maintenance or technical issues.
customerMessage: The recipient's bank is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
resolution: Check the recipient's bank official website for maintenance windows. Retry after 1-2 hours.

title: IMPS Transfer Failed
description: Immediate Payment Service transfer failed. This is an NPCI network issue.
customerMessage: IMPS transfer failed. Your money is safe and has not been deducted. Please try again.
resolution: IMPS failures are usually temporary. Retry the transaction. If deducted, it will be reversed within 24 hours.

title: NEFT Processing Hours
description: NEFT is processed in batches. The current time is outside normal NEFT processing hours.
customerMessage: NEFT payments are processed between 8 AM and 7 PM on working days. Your payment is queued.
resolution: Payment will be processed in the next NEFT batch. Choose IMPS or UPI for immediate transfer.

title: UPI Address Not Registered
description: The UPI Virtual Payment Address (VPA/UPI ID) is not registered with any bank.
customerMessage: The UPI ID doesn't exist. Please check for typos or ask the recipient for their correct UPI ID.
resolution: Double-check the UPI ID format (user@bank). Common errors: extra spaces, wrong bank handle.

title: Card Expired
description: The debit or credit card used for this transaction has expired.
customerMessage: Your card has expired. Please use your new card or update your card details.
resolution: Use the new replacement card issued by your bank. Update card details in all saved payment methods.

title: International Transactions Blocked
description: International transactions are not enabled on this account/card.
customerMessage: International payments are not enabled. Please enable them in your banking app or contact your bank.
resolution: Enable international transactions via bank app or call bank's customer care. May have daily limit.

title: Payment Processing Timeout
description: The payment processing workflow exceeded the maximum allowed time. The transaction has been cancelled and any reserved funds will be released.
customerMessage: Payment processing timed out. If funds were deducted, they will be returned within 24 hours. Please try again.
resolution: Reserved funds automatically released within 2-4 hours. Check balance before retrying. If deducted, contact support.

title: Beneficiary Name Mismatch
description: The name provided does not match the account holder name at the destination bank (Confirmation of Payee failed).
customerMessage: The recipient name doesn't match the account records. Please verify the account details with the recipient.
resolution: Ask recipient to confirm exact account holder name as registered with their bank. Common issue with joint accounts.

title: Recipient Account Dormant
description: The destination account has been inactive for over 24 months and classified as dormant by the recipient bank.
customerMessage: The recipient's account is dormant. Please ask them to activate their account first.
resolution: Recipient needs to contact their bank to reactivate the account. May require KYC update.

title: Payment Gateway Unavailable
description: The external payment processing system is temporarily unreachable. Circuit breaker is open.
customerMessage: Payment services are temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
resolution: System will auto-recover. Retry after 5 minutes. Check status page for planned maintenance.

title: Card Declined by Issuer
description: The card-issuing bank declined the transaction. This could be due to fraud prevention, insufficient credit, or bank policy.
customerMessage: Your card was declined by your bank. Please contact your bank or try another payment method.
resolution: Call number on back of card to understand decline reason. Try alternate card or payment method.

title: Card Do Not Honor
description: Generic decline code from card issuer meaning the bank is refusing the transaction without specific reason.
customerMessage: Your card cannot be used for this transaction. Please contact your bank or use a different card.
resolution: Contact card-issuing bank. May be due to temporary block, unusual activity flag, or credit limit.

title: Card Type Not Supported
description: The card type or brand is not supported for this transaction type.
customerMessage: This card type is not supported. Please try a different card.
resolution: Use Visa, Mastercard, or RuPay card. Prepaid cards and virtual cards may have restrictions.

title: Balance Calculation Error
description: System detected an inconsistency between the account balance in the cache and the ledger. Transaction paused for safety.
customerMessage: A technical issue occurred. Your funds are safe. Please contact support.
resolution: Engineering team must reconcile balance. Do not retry. File incident ticket immediately.

title: Partner Bank Rejection
description: The transaction was rejected by the partner/correspondent bank in the payment chain.
customerMessage: The payment was rejected during processing. Your funds are safe and will be returned.
resolution: Check if bank account details are current. Some accounts require specific payment reference formats.

title: Regulatory Hold
description: Transaction held for compliance review due to regulatory requirements (FEMA, AML, etc.).
customerMessage: Your transaction is under review. This typically takes 1-2 business days. No action required.
resolution: Compliance team will review and either release or request documentation. Customer may need to provide purpose.

title: Too Many Requests
description: The API request rate limit has been exceeded for this user or IP address.
customerMessage: You've made too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
resolution: Wait 60 seconds before retrying. If this is an integration, implement exponential backoff.

title: Foreign Exchange Rate Expired
description: The quoted exchange rate for this international transfer has expired. Rates are valid for 30 seconds.
customerMessage: The exchange rate has changed. Please confirm the new rate to proceed.
resolution: Fetch new rate and re-confirm transaction with customer. Rate valid for 30 seconds after quote.

title: OTP Expired
description: The one-time password used for 2FA has expired. OTPs are valid for 5 minutes.
customerMessage: The OTP has expired. Please request a new one.
resolution: Request new OTP. If OTP not received, check SMS spam folder or try voice OTP.

title: Monthly Transaction Limit Exceeded
description: Total transactions this month have exceeded the allowed monthly limit for this account tier.
customerMessage: You've reached your monthly transaction limit. It resets on the 1st of next month.
resolution: Upgrade account tier for higher limits, or wait for monthly reset. Corporate accounts have higher limits.

title: NACH Mandate Rejected by Destination Bank
description: The NPCI NACH debit mandate was rejected by the beneficiary bank. Common reasons: invalid account number, signature mismatch, account type mismatch, or account closed.
customerMessage: Your auto-pay mandate was rejected. Please re-register the mandate with correct bank details.
resolution: Check mandate registration details. Common issues: savings vs current account mismatch, account number changed after bank merger. Re-register mandate via NPCI NACH portal.

title: UPI Lite Balance Insufficient
description: UPI Lite (offline UPI) wallet balance is insufficient. UPI Lite holds a small prepaid balance on-device (max ₹2,000 per RBI circular). Transactions above the UPI Lite balance fall back to full UPI.
customerMessage: Your UPI Lite balance is low. Top up your UPI Lite wallet or switch to regular UPI for this payment.
resolution: UPI Lite auto-refills from linked account when balance drops below threshold. Manual refill available in UPI app. Transactions > ₹500 automatically use regular UPI.

title: Third-Party App Provider Blocked
description: The UPI Third-Party Application Provider (TPAP — e.g. PhonePe, GPay, Paytm) has been temporarily blocked by NPCI or RBI for compliance issues.
customerMessage: Payments via this UPI app are temporarily unavailable. Please try another UPI app or payment method.
resolution: Use a different UPI-enabled app or bank's own UPI. TPAP blocks are typically resolved within hours. Check NPCI website for updates.

title: Account Frozen - AML Review
description: The account has been frozen by the compliance team under Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA) provisions pending investigation. FIU-IND report may have been filed.
customerMessage: Your account has been temporarily frozen for a mandatory compliance review. Please contact support with your identity documents.
resolution: Customer must contact compliance team. STR (Suspicious Transaction Report) may have been filed with FIU-IND. Resolution requires compliance review which may take 3-30 business days. Regulatory hold cannot be bypassed.

title: Beneficiary Bank Offline - NPCI Network
description: NPCI reports the beneficiary bank's connection to the payment network is offline. This affects all UPI, IMPS, and NEFT payments to accounts at that bank.
customerMessage: The recipient's bank is temporarily disconnected from the payment network. Please try again in a few hours.
resolution: This is an NPCI-level connectivity issue with the beneficiary bank. Monitor NPCI status page. Retry after 2-4 hours. Consider using a different transfer method if urgent.

title: Card Velocity Limit Exceeded
description: Too many card transactions within a short time window. Card network or issuer velocity rules triggered. Common after card testing attack or legitimate high-frequency purchases.
customerMessage: Too many card transactions. Please wait 30 minutes before trying again, or contact your bank to temporarily raise your limit.
resolution: Wait 30-60 minutes for velocity window to reset. If due to card testing, card may be temporarily blocked. Contact issuing bank's fraud line.

title: Payment Held for Fraud Review
description: AegisPay risk system has flagged this transaction for real-time fraud review. Funds are temporarily held pending manual or automated review. No deduction has occurred.
customerMessage: This payment is under security review. You will be notified within 2 hours. No money has been deducted yet.
resolution: Risk team reviews flagged transactions within 2 hours. Customer may be asked to provide additional verification (OTP, selfie, document). If cleared, payment processes normally. If declined, no deduction occurs.

title: BBPS Biller System Unavailable
description: The biller (electricity board, gas company, etc.) registered on Bharat Bill Payment System (BBPS) is not responding. BBPS is NPCI's integrated bill payment platform covering 20,000+ billers.
customerMessage: The bill payment service for this provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
resolution: BBPS biller outages are typically resolved within 1-4 hours. Bill due date is usually still met if payment initiated before midnight. Check BBPS status page or biller's website.
